item.name: Addons

description.content: Operations for managing EKS add-ons

item.name: Amazon EKS Create an EKS Add-on

request.name: Amazon EKS Create an EKS Add-on

description.content: Creates an Amazon EKS add-on. Amazon EKS add-ons help to automate the provisioning and lifecycle management of common operational software for Amazon EKS clusters.

item.name: Amazon EKS List EKS Add-ons

description.content: Lists the available add-ons for an Amazon EKS cluster.

item.name: Amazon EKS Describe an EKS Add-on

request.name: Amazon EKS Describe an EKS Add-on

description.content: Describes an Amazon EKS add-on.

item.name: Amazon EKS Delete an EKS Add-on

request.name: Amazon EKS Delete an EKS Add-on

description.content: Deletes an Amazon EKS add-on.

item.name: Clusters

description.content: Operations for managing EKS clusters

item.name: Amazon EKS Create a New EKS Cluster

request.name: Amazon EKS Create a New EKS Cluster

description.content: Creates an Amazon EKS control plane. The Amazon EKS control plane consists of control plane instances that run the Kubernetes software, such as etcd and the API server.

item.name: Amazon EKS List EKS Clusters

description.content: Lists the Amazon EKS clusters in your AWS account in the specified Region.

item.name: Amazon EKS Describe an EKS Cluster

request.name: Amazon EKS Describe an EKS Cluster

description.content: Returns descriptive information about an Amazon EKS cluster.

item.name: Amazon EKS Delete an EKS Cluster

request.name: Amazon EKS Delete an EKS Cluster

description.content: Deletes the Amazon EKS cluster control plane. You must delete all node groups and Fargate profiles before deleting a cluster.

item.name: Fargate Profiles

description.content: Operations for managing EKS Fargate profiles

item.name: Amazon EKS Create a Fargate Profile

request.name: Amazon EKS Create a Fargate Profile

description.content: Creates an AWS Fargate profile for your Amazon EKS cluster. You must have at least one Fargate profile in a cluster to be able to run pods on Fargate.

item.name: Amazon EKS List Fargate Profiles

description.content: Lists the AWS Fargate profiles associated with the specified cluster.

item.name: Amazon EKS Describe a Fargate Profile

request.name: Amazon EKS Describe a Fargate Profile

description.content: Returns descriptive information about an AWS Fargate profile.

item.name: Amazon EKS Delete a Fargate Profile

request.name: Amazon EKS Delete a Fargate Profile

description.content: Deletes an AWS Fargate profile.

item.name: Node Groups

description.content: Operations for managing EKS managed node groups

item.name: Amazon EKS Create a Managed Node Group

request.name: Amazon EKS Create a Managed Node Group

description.content: Creates a managed node group for an Amazon EKS cluster. You can only create a node group for your cluster that is equal to the current Kubernetes version for the cluster.

item.name: Amazon EKS List Managed Node Groups

request.name: Amazon EKS List Managed Node Groups

description.content: Lists the managed node groups associated with the specified cluster.

item.name: Amazon EKS Describe a Managed Node Group

request.name: Amazon EKS Describe a Managed Node Group

description.content: Returns descriptive information about a managed node group.

item.name: Amazon EKS Delete a Managed Node Group

request.name: Amazon EKS Delete a Managed Node Group

description.content: Deletes an Amazon EKS managed node group for a cluster.

Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) is a managed Kubernetes service that makes it easy to run Kubernetes on AWS without needing to install, operate, and maintain your own Kubernetes control plane or nodes.

Contact Support:
 Name: Amazon Web Services
